product_overview: CRM Odonto is a multi-tenant SaaS platform for dental clinics that centralizes patient management, appointments, CRM, WhatsApp communication, finance and marketing in a single web interface. The frontend is a React SPA backed by Supabase for Auth, Database, Storage and Edge Functions.
core_goals: Provide a single-pane-of-glass web app for clinic operations: patients, agenda, CRM, chat, finance, marketing and tasks.
Enable multi-tenant data isolation per clinic using Supabase Row Level Security while keeping an easy-to-use frontend SPA workflow.
Support clinic collaboration with role-based UI, lead-to-patient conversion, appointment scheduling, and integrated WhatsApp messaging.
Offer actionable analytics (KPIs and charts) for operational and marketing decisions.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate clinic users with email and password via Supabase Auth and access the SPA shell.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to / -> Fill in email -> Fill in incorrect password -> Submit login form -> See error message "E-mail ou senha incorretos."
Navigate to / -> Trigger forgot password flow -> Follow recovery link to /reset-password -> Set new password -> Confirm and return to login

features.name: User Sign Up
features.description: Create a new clinic user account with name, email and password and receive confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to sign up mode -> Fill nome completo -> Fill email -> Fill password (min 6 chars) -> Submit sign up form -> See success message "Conta criada com sucesso!" -> See dashboard
Navigate to / -> Switch to sign up mode -> Fill email that is already registered -> Fill password -> Submit sign up form -> See validation error indicating email already in use

features.name: Forgot Password / Reset
features.description: Send a password recovery email and complete password reset via the reset link.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Trigger forgot password flow -> Fill in email -> Submit recovery request -> See success message about recovery email sent -> Open link sent by email to /reset-password -> Fill new password -> Submit -> See confirmation and return to login
Navigate to / -> Trigger forgot password flow -> Fill unknown email -> Submit recovery request -> See error or informative message if account not found

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main clinic dashboard showing KPI cards, charts, recent patients and upcoming appointments for quick insights and navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View KPI cards (patients, appointments, leads, revenue) -> View charts (appointments by status, revenue trend) -> Use quick navigation card to open pacientes module
Navigate to / -> See loading indicators for metrics -> See error banner if data fetch fails (network or permissions) and retry option

features.name: Patients Management
features.description: Create, read, update and delete patient records, upload documents and view the dental chart (odontograma).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open pacientes module -> View patient list with search and filters -> Create new patient via form -> Fill patient form fields (nome, telefone, email, cpf, data_nascimento, endereco, observacoes) -> Submit form -> See new patient in list -> Open patient details -> View odontograma
Navigate to / -> Open pacientes module -> Start create patient flow with missing required fields -> Submit form -> See validation errors and remain on form
Navigate to / -> Open pacientes module -> Select patient -> Upload patient documents -> See uploaded document appear in patient documents list
Navigate to / -> Open pacientes module -> Select patient -> Initiate delete patient -> Confirm deletion -> See patient removed from list

features.name: Appointment Schedule
features.description: Calendar-based appointment management with create, edit, drag-to-reschedule and status changes for consultations.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open agenda module -> View weekly calendar -> Click empty slot to create new appointment -> Select patient -> Select dentist -> Set date/time and duration -> Submit appointment -> See appointment appear on calendar with status color
Navigate to / -> Open agenda module -> Click existing appointment -> Edit date/time and save -> See appointment move to new slot
Navigate to / -> Open agenda module -> Create appointment overlapping existing appointment -> Submit appointment -> See validation error or conflict notice preventing save

features.name: CRM Lead Management
features.description: Kanban-style CRM to capture, track and convert leads with drag-and-drop pipeline stages and lead detail timeline.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open crm module -> View leads in kanban board grouped by funnel stages -> Click to create new lead -> Fill lead details (nome, telefone, email, origem, interesse) -> Submit -> See lead card appear in selected stage
Navigate to / -> Open crm module -> Drag lead card from one funnel stage to another -> See lead stage updated and reflected in metrics
Navigate to / -> Open crm module -> Open lead card -> Add follow-up history entry -> See timeline updated
Navigate to / -> Open crm module -> Start create lead flow with missing required fields -> Submit -> See validation errors

features.name: Financial Management
features.description: Record and view revenues and expenses, manage recurring expenses and see monthly financial summaries and charts.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open financeiro module -> View monthly financial summary (revenue, expenses, balance) -> Add new revenue entry with patient link -> Submit -> See revenue total updated and chart refreshed
Navigate to / -> Open financeiro module -> Add new expense entry with amount and category -> Submit -> See expense appear in list and summary totals update
Navigate to / -> Open financeiro module -> Attempt to save entry with invalid amount -> Submit -> See validation error and prevent save

features.name: Marketing ROI
features.description: Track marketing investments, set monthly goals and analyze ROI and channel performance over selectable periods.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open marketing module -> View KPI cards (investment, revenue, ROI, CAC) -> Add marketing investment with channel, amount and month -> Submit -> See investment reflected in charts and channel performance table
Navigate to / -> Open marketing module -> Set monthly goals (leads, conversions, ROI targets) -> Submit -> See goals displayed and compared with actuals
Navigate to / -> Open marketing module -> Attempt to add investment with invalid month range -> Submit -> See validation error

features.name: WhatsApp Chat
features.description: WhatsApp messaging interface integrated via the Uzapi for conversations, media and audio messaging tied to leads/patients.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open chat module -> View conversation list with unread counts -> Search conversations by name or phone -> Select conversation to view messages -> Type and send text message -> See message appear in conversation
Navigate to / -> Open chat module -> Record and send audio message -> See audio message appear and playable in conversation
Navigate to / -> Open chat module -> Attempt to send message when Uzapi integration is not configured -> See integration error or send failure indicator

features.name: Settings
features.description: Clinic administrative settings including clinic data, user management, sectors, funnels, procedures and integrations (WhatsApp, Google Calendar).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open configuracoes module -> Open Clinica tab -> Edit clinic information (name, address, logo) -> Save changes -> See updated clinic information
Navigate to / -> Open configuracoes module -> Open Usuarios tab -> Add new user with role and sector -> Submit -> See new user in users list
Navigate to / -> Open configuracoes module -> Open Integracoes -> Configure WhatsApp integration for a sector -> Initiate instance creation -> See QR code or instance status
Navigate to / -> Open configuracoes module as non-gestor -> Attempt to access restricted admin tabs -> See UI restrict access or prompts indicating insufficient permissions

features.name: Tasks
features.description: Team task management with creation, assignment, due dates, status tracking and kanban-style columns.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open tarefas module -> View task list with filters (status, assignee) -> Create new task with title, description, due date and assignee -> Submit -> See task appear in Pendente column
Navigate to / -> Open tarefas module -> Move task from Pendente to Em Andamento -> Mark task as complete -> See task move to Concluída
Navigate to / -> Open tarefas module -> Attempt to create task without title -> Submit -> See validation error preventing creation

routes.description: Main SPA shell - renders internal pages based on state (dashboard, pacientes, agenda, crm, planos, financeiro, marketing, chat, tarefas, configuracoes)
Password reset page triggered by email link

See error message "E-mail ou senha incorretos." on invalid credentials

Click "Criar conta" to switch to sign up mode

See success message "Conta criada com sucesso!"

known_limitations.issue: App uses SPA routing with React state instead of URL-based routes; all authenticated pages render under /
known_limitations.impact: Direct URL navigation to specific modules is not possible; all navigation is state-driven

known_limitations.issue: Role-based access is enforced only on the frontend; no server-side middleware guards
known_limitations.impact: Users could potentially access restricted modules by manipulating state, though RLS on Supabase provides data-level security

known_limitations.issue: WhatsApp chat requires active Uzapi instance configured per clinic sector
known_limitations.impact: Chat features will not work without properly configured Uzapi integration
